title: A man of God puts sin to death — not just manages it
caption:
Scripture doesn't say manage your sin. It says put it to death. Col. 3:5.

Most men manage. They keep it below a certain level, never let it get too bad, call it progress. That's not killing it. That's feeding it on a schedule.

Four moves toward actually killing it — swipe.

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #scripture #colossians #sinandgrace #manofgod #bibleverses #spiritualgrowth #holiness
